items.badge_description: Do you come from the land down under, where beer does flow, and men chunder? That's at least 475 different beers from Australia. Try 5 more for Level 96!

If your mash uses more than 50% wheat, you’ve got yourself a wheat beer. This diverse family includes goses, hefeweizens, American wheat ales, and more! That's 20 different beers in the "Wheat" category! Try 5 more for Level 5!
It may not be cloudy outside, but your brew definitely is! That’s at least 35 different hefeweizens. Try 5 more to unlock Level 8.

If your mash uses more than 50% wheat, you’ve got yourself a wheat beer. This diverse family includes goses, hefeweizens, American wheat ales, and more! That's 35 different beers in the "Wheat" category! Try 5 more for Level 8!

There's beer in them thar hills! You're setting off on your journey through the world of beer, but be sure to take a little time to get to know each brewery as you go. That's a beer from 260 different breweries. Try 5 more for Level 53!

Want to enjoy a day of brews, but need to keep your wits sharp? There are plenty of delicious brews under 5% for you to sip on throughout the day. That's 130 different beers with an ABV of 5% and lower. Try 5 more for Level 27!
It may not be cloudy outside, but your brew definitely is! That’s at least 10 different hefeweizens. Try 5 more to unlock Level 3.

If your mash uses more than 50% wheat, you’ve got yourself a wheat beer. This diverse family includes goses, hefeweizens, American wheat ales, and more! That's 5 different beers in the "Wheat" category! Try 5 more for Level 2!

It takes the perfect amount of light, the right framing and a touch of creative love to get the perfect picture of your brew. Now it’s time to drink it! That's 485 check-ins with a photo.  Try 5 more for Level 98!

Want to enjoy a day of brews, but need to keep your wits sharp? There are plenty of delicious brews under 5% for you to sip on throughout the day. That's 25 different beers with an ABV of 5% and lower. Try 5 more for Level 6!
Do you come from the land down under, where beer does flow, and men chunder? That's at least 15 different beers from Australia. Try 5 more for Level 4.

Everyone loves fresh beer, but obviously not as much as you do. You went straight to the source. 

That's a beer at 5 different venues categorized as a Brewery, Cidery or Meadery. Visit 5 more for Level 2!

user.bio: Pro drunk photographer. There are more than 100k beers on Untappd. I can't drink all of them, but at least I must try
